zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Nute於1648年1月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾時，她的父親James S. Nute35歲，母親Sarah Heard28歲。她於大約1662年與James Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1698年10月14日在她的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Nute于1648年1月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾时，她的父亲James S. Nute35岁，母亲Sarah Heard28岁。她于大约1662年与James Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾多福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1698年10月14日在她的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall): probably a variant of   Newitt  .

variants.name: Newitt
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Middle English newete, the older, unshortened, form of newte ‘newt’, itself for Old English efete with initial n detached from a preceding indefinite article.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Nute was born on 11 January 1648, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, James S. Nute, was 35 and her mother, Sarah Heard, was 28. She married James Bunker about 1662, in Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 14 October 1698, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Nute est née le 11 janvier 1648, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, James S. Nute, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sarah Heard, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé James Bunker environ 1662, à Dover, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 octobre 1698, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Nute(이)가 1648년 1월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James S. Nute(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Heard(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1662년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 도버에서 James Bunker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1698년 10월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Nute nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1648, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, James S. Nute, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Heard, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com James Bunker aproximadamente 1662, em Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1698, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Nute родилась 11 января 1648 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени James S. Nute было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Heard, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Bunker около 1662 г. в местности довир, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 октября 1698 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con James Bunker aproximadamente 1662, en Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1698, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
